publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-01-04 18:29:35 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Manuals, instructions, surveys, historical records, publications, newsletters, and memorabilia.
did.abstract: Statler standard instruction manuals for accounting and finance, housekeeping, employee training and job descriptions; folders on the history of the hotels, instructions and procedures, wage surveys; sales and convention information; executive training materials; publications, newsletters, and memorabilia. Also includes newsletters and other items relating to the Statler Alumni Club.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Statler standard instruction manuals for accounting and finance, housekeeping, employee training and job descriptions; folders on the history of the hotels, instructions and procedures, wage surveys; sales and convention information; executive training materials; publications, newsletters, and memorabilia. Also includes newsletters and other items relating to the Statler Alumni Club.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Hotels Statler Company records, #4303. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Management Development in the Hotel Industry
Standard Instructions - Accounting; Other Departments A25000, copy for Mr. Bone
Standard Instructions - Auditing; Miscellaneous A2000, copy for Mr. Bone
Standard Instructions - Payroll A6000, copy for Mr. Bone
Wage Analysis - New York State Hotel Association
Hotel Monthly - Los Angeles Statler and Hartford Statler
The Hotel World - Review: 75 Years of Hotel History
Carl Thurston correspondence and memos concerning Hotels Statler Company

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Coffee can, ash tray, dinner plate, HEC photograph album, marble paperweight inscribed "Hotel Statler, Buffalo 1923-1984," brick "From the first permanent Statler Hotel" - Hotel Statler, Buffalo, N.Y.

did.unittitle: Talks to Room Clerks; Talks to Waiters and Waitresses; Instructions to Room Service Waiters, Bellmen, Maids
"Be a Clever Cover Girl: A Guide for Statler Waitresses" (2 copies)
"Statler Service Codes"- booklets from three different years
Hotel Statler Booklets from Buffalo, St. Louis, Detroit, Cleveland
Hotel Credit Department Legal Guide and Practical Procedures"- Hotel Association of New York City
"Hotel" the magazine of the hotel workers of New York
"The New York Hotel Story" - Industrial Bulletin
"The Alarm Clock" - Monthly Bulletin issued by the staff of Horwath and Horwath
General Rules for Employees - Hotel Pennsylvania
Hotel Management Clipping Bureau of Good Ideas
Statler and Hilton Memo Books for Daily Follow-Up
"When Good Fellows Get Together" - Wines and Liquors Manual
Culinary Glossaries - Spanish, Austro-German, French, Italian - Wine and Food Society
Postcards from various Statler Hotels, Statler Corkscrew, Decals
"The Story of the Los Angeles Statler"
Booklet and Menu from Opening of the Statler Center in Los Angeles
Photograph of the Centennial Freshman Class at Cornell University Centennial Banquet
Photograph of Dinner given by James McCabe
Photograph of the Hotel Statler Employees' Choral Club - Buffalo
Photograph of 20 Year Employees - Hotel Statler, Boston
Photograph of Dinner Given by James McCabe
Photograph of Dinner Given by James McCabe
Photograph of Hotels Statler Co., Inc. Founders Day Dinner
Photograph of Hotels Statler Co., Inc. Founders Day
Photograph of Hotel Statler Executive Office Christmas Party
Photograph of Farewell Dinner Party to Don Mumford
Photograph of 4th Annual Founders Day Dinner
Photograph of Dinner Given by James McCabe
Newspaper "Public Ledger - Philadelphia" - article about opening of Hotel Pennsylvania
"Class" Quotes and Policies by E.M. Statler
Addition to Collection - not donated by Carl Thurston
Articles about Waiters in Bound Volume
Hotel Stationery and Articles in Bound Volume
Reproductions of Articles concerning the Statler Enterprises
Interim Report on Automation for Hotels by Profesoor C.I. Sayles
"The Union Organization of the Miami Beach Hotels - By John Hanly
"The Miami Beach Hotel Labor-Management Dispute March-August 1955" - by John Harney
Hotel and Restaurant History - Brochures, Publications
Banquet and Entertainment Price Schedules and Requirements
"Front of the House" - Lewis Hotel-Motel Schools - Five LP Phonograph records
"An American Adventure" the story of Ellsworth Statler
Public Relations Achievement Award Competition - Waldorf-Astoria Entry
Statler Center Los Angeles Floor Plans
Scrapbook containing articles about various hotels
Photo of President Harding and Letter to Oscar of the Waldorf-Astoria Hotel
Lewis Hotel Training Schools - Practice Work Sheets and Exams
Lewis Hotel Training Schools - Poster and Memos
